ddt:Target.Name: CAN MESSAGE SET v62.43_Official_29_07_15
ddt:Target.Description:
Messagerie CAN / CAN database: CAN MESSAGE SET v62.43_Official_29_07_15
Importé le / Import date: 2015-10-16 10:28:15

Item.Text: Passenger Safety Belt not fastened (switch closed)
Push brake pedal requested (Shiftlock for Automatic gear or cranking with transmission range engaged for robotized gear)
declutched at rest (drag reduction request for RGB) or licking (?) point
left and right flashing indicators OFF
left flashing indicator ON and right flashing indicator OFF
left flashing indicator OFF and right flashing indicator ON
left flashing indicator ON and right flashing indicator ON
heater unit set point not frozen
Day time running light not requested
card / key n°1 identified by BCM
card / key n°2 identified by BCM
card / key n°3 identified by BCM
card / key n°4 identified by BCM
Upward and downward scrolling request (ADAC reset)
rear defrost requested by the ECM
counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures masked
counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures not masked
ESP operational or vehicle not equipped (lamp off)
ABS operational or vehicle not equipped (lamp off)
EBV operational or vehicle not equipped (lamp off)
Request to use TCS map in warm
Request to use TCS map in cold
Digit not programmed should be coded as 1111
lamp blinking (safety belt not fastened and V>15km/h and tempo<10s)
Involuntary SL over speed warning not requested
Involuntary SL over speed warning requested
Cruise Control (CC) and Speed Limit (SL) OFF
vehicle not equipped with CC and SL
electrical consumption freezing request (no changes allowed)
exact torque request can not be achieved (measure imprecision)
transient state preventing torque request realization
torque request can not be achieved
data received in frame Brake_StabilityControl not consistent
data received in frame Brake_StabilityControl consistent
data received in frame AT_TorqueControl not consistent
data received in frame AT_TorqueControl consistent
No display request (no freeshift function or not equipped)
No Shift change display Request (by freeshift function)
No Particulate filter failure warning message
CC and SL inactive (OFF, in standby or inactive)
No mechanical load requested by ECM
tyre under inflated (pressure lower than 1st warning threshold)
tyre under inflated (pressure lower than 1st warning threshold)
tyre under inflated (pressure lower than 1st warning threshold)
tyre under inflated (pressure lower than 1st warning threshold)
Reset driver NOT taken into account
Rear UPA de-activated and front UPA activated
Rear UPA activated and front UPA de-activated
Rear zone 1 display requested - furthest zone
Rear zone 4 display requested - nearest zone
Lateral zone 1 display requested - furthest zone
Lateral zone 3 display requested - nearest zone
Lateral usual mode zone display requested
Rear zone 1 display requested - furthest zone
Rear zone 4 display requested - nearest zone
Lateral zone 1 display requested - furthest zone
Lateral zone 3 display requested - nearest zone
Rear usual mode zone display requested
Rear zone 1 display requested - furthest zone
Rear zone 4 display requested - nearest zone
Lateral zone 1 display requested - furthest zone
Lateral zone 3 display requested - nearest zone
Lateral usual mode zone display requested
Stop Start Reminder display not requested
Prompting for declutch display not requested
Water pump activation requested by SSCU
Water pump activation not requested by SSCU
NO Stop Auto Unavailable Display Request
Engine stop auto warn not activated
not available (init or lever switched failure)
No front park assistance volume request
Front parking assistance volume level 1 requested
Front parking assistance volume level 2 requested
Front parking assistance volume level 3 requested
Front parking assistance volume level 4 requested
Front parking assistance volume level 5 requested
Front parking assistance volume level 6 requested
Clutch pedal not pressed at maximum
Battery Voltage over threshold - no warning
front wiper low speed protection active
